title: US Department of Justice endorses antitrust bill against Amazon, Google, Apple

The DOJ accused large digital platforms of being a threat to open markets, abusing their monopolies, squeezing profits from competitors and posing a risk to consumers by anti-competitive practices, The Wall Street Journal reported, quoting a letter from Peter Hyun, acting assistant attorney general for legislative affairs for the department.
